# CyberBench

> CyberBench is a marketplace that helps companies find and compare vetted cybersecurity providers — MSSPs, vCISO firms, penetration testers, incident response, compliance, and more. Buyers describe their needs and get matched to qualified providers for free. CyberBench also offers a free external domain security scan. It is operated by VISO Group.

## What CyberBench does

- **Get Matched (free for buyers):** Describe your security needs and get matched to vetted providers ranked by fit. No cost, no obligation.
- **Provider directory:** Browse cybersecurity providers by service category and location.
- **Free domain security scan:** Run a complimentary external attack-surface scan of your domain.
- **Provider listings:** Cybersecurity firms can list their company, get verified, and receive qualified buyer leads.

## Service categories

Managed security (MSSP), virtual CISO (vCISO), penetration testing, incident response, compliance and audit (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI), security awareness training, cloud security, and more.

## For buyers

Use [Get Matched](https://cyberbench.net/get-matched) to be connected with providers, or run a [free domain scan](https://cyberbench.net/scan). Matching is free and providers only receive your request if they fit your stated needs.

## For providers

[List your company](https://cyberbench.net/list-your-company) to appear in the directory and receive buyer matches. Tiers: Basic (free), Verified, Featured, and Founding.
